languages.original_text: "But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: "Но разве можно поистине познать чужую суть? Ведь завесь из слов часто скрывает смыслы, которые невозможно обнаружить за один краткий разговор. С другой стороны, все величайшие труды о людском естестве начинались с малого. Спрашивайте, Вольный Торговец".

"But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

"But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

"But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

languages.text: «Pero ¿puede alguien conocer la verdadera esencia de otro individuo? El velo de las palabras suele ocultar un significado que es imposible descubrir en una sola conversación. Dicho eso, todas las grandes obras sobre la naturaleza humana comenzaron con muy poco material. Pregunte, Comerciante».
languages.original_text: "But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: «Pero ¿puede alguien conocer la verdadera esencia de otro individuo? El velo de las palabras suele ocultar un significado que es imposible descubrir en una sola conversación. Dicho eso, todas las grandes obras sobre la naturaleza humana comenzaron con muy poco material. Pregunte, Comerciante».

languages.text: “但是，一个人真的能完全了解另一个人的本质吗？言语就像一层面纱，常常遮蔽着那些无法在短暂对话中揭示的意义。不过话说回来，所有关于人性的伟大著作，最初都始于寥寥无几的素材。请问吧，行商浪人。”
languages.original_text: "But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: “但是，一个人真的能完全了解另一个人的本质吗？言语就像一层面纱，常常遮蔽着那些无法在短暂对话中揭示的意义。不过话说回来，所有关于人性的伟大著作，最初都始于寥寥无几的素材。请问吧，行商浪人。”

languages.text: « Mais peut-on vraiment connaître l'essence même d'une personne ? Les mots ne servent parfois qu'à noyer un sens plus profond, impossible à comprendre par une brève conversation. Cela étant, les plus grands travaux sur la nature humaine se basent sur un matériel limité. Posez vos questions, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »
languages.original_text: "But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: « Mais peut-on vraiment connaître l'essence même d'une personne ? Les mots ne servent parfois qu'à noyer un sens plus profond, impossible à comprendre par une brève conversation. Cela étant, les plus grands travaux sur la nature humaine se basent sur un matériel limité. Posez vos questions, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. »

languages.text: "Aber kann jemand die Essenz einer anderen Person wirklich kennen? Schließlich liegt oft ein Schleier aus Worten über einer Bedeutung, die in einem kurzen Gespräch nicht entdeckt werden kann. Andererseits lagen allen großen Werken der menschlichen Natur spärliche Materialien zugrunde. Stellt Eure Fragen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."
languages.original_text: "But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: "Aber kann jemand die Essenz einer anderen Person wirklich kennen? Schließlich liegt oft ein Schleier aus Worten über einer Bedeutung, die in einem kurzen Gespräch nicht entdeckt werden kann. Andererseits lagen allen großen Werken der menschlichen Natur spärliche Materialien zugrunde. Stellt Eure Fragen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}."

languages.text: 「しかし、誰かが他人の本質を本当に知ることができるだろうか？言葉のベールに覆われ、一度の短い会話では発見できない意味を持つことがよくあるからだ。そしてまた、人間の本質に関するすべての偉大な作品は、乏しい資料から始まった。質問してごらん、ローグ・トレーダー」
languages.original_text: "But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、誰かが他人の本質を本当に知ることができるだろうか？言葉のベールに覆われ、一度の短い会話では発見できない意味を持つことがよくあるからだ。そしてまた、人間の本質に関するすべての偉大な作品は、乏しい資料から始まった。質問してごらん、ローグ・トレーダー」

languages.text: "Fakat bir kimse, başka bir kimsenin özünü gerçekten bilebilir mi? Zira kelimelerden oluşan bir örtü, genellikle kısa bir konuşmada keşfedilemeyen bir anlamı gizler. Öte yandan insan doğası hakkındaki en büyük eserlerin tümü yetersiz malzemeyle başlamıştır. İstediğinizi sorabilirsiniz Hür Tacir."
languages.original_text: "But can anyone truly know the essence of another person? For a veil of words often shrouds meaning that cannot be discovered in one brief conversation. Then again, all the greatest works on human nature began with scant material. Ask your questions, Rogue Trader."
